notes: Iter 4 nominally includes a cold JAX compile component; recovar-late-replay-7331576 saw 237s with a warmed cache. Setting baseline at 240s nominal with tolerance_multiplier=2.0 (warn at 480s) and regression_threshold_multiplier=3.0 (REGRESS at 720s) gives headroom for cold-compile while still catching pathological slowdowns.
Iters 5-6 land at ~222-225s with warm cache.
Iter 7 jumped to ~660s (11 min) when healpix_order incremented from 4 to 5 (4x more rotations) — see recovar-late-replay-7334218.

Iters 8-14: extrapolated conservatively from iter 7 assuming healpix_order=5-6 throughout. We do NOT have direct ground-truth timings for these; the baseline is intentionally generous. Reset once a real run completes successfully.

Stage breakdown: e_step (covers RELION's expectation step including coarse pass1 + adaptive pass2 + per-half M-step backprojection in run_em) is dominant; recon/fsc/noise_update/convergence each <10s.
Iter index in this file is the RELION iter index (init_relion_iteration + recovar_iteration + 1).
